confirmReset.title: Change build?
confirmReset.message: This recomputes your sheet and resets dependent choices: your subclass, prepared spells, and class-specific picks (maneuvers, invocations, metamagic, masteries) may be lost.

details.picks: Class picks removed (maneuvers, invocations, metamagic, masteries, styles): {{count}}
details.abilityScores: Ability score increases from removed levels are not reverted. Review your scores
